goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'clare hall'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'arrive by 17:45'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called clare hall
Make sure you get area and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from stevenage and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on tuesday and should arrive by 17:45
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
